sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48398" key="qerei/aulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θερεί-αυλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, prob. <sense id="n48398.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">living in villeggiatura</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">96</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
